description: Pre-computed LocationScout output artifacts for ShotGeneration downstream validation. Anchor and mood are the formal contracts; bible is companion context required by prompt-compiler.

anchor.note: 1x1 transparent PNG stub — sufficient for schema/transport validation, not for visual quality

data.light_change: Sodium neon bleed from exterior parking-lot sign, cold fluorescent spill from bathroom
data.props_change: Bedside lamp switched on, curtains partially drawn
data.atmosphere_shift: Isolation deepens as exterior activity dies down

bible.note: Companion context — ShotGeneration calls loadLocationBible() for prompt compilation even though bible is not a formal contract edge

data.space_description: A budget motel room off Route 66, circa 2004. Queen bed with thin polyester spread in faded teal. Nightstand with chipped laminate top, rotary-style telephone, Gideon Bible. CRT television on a wall bracket angled toward the bed. Bathroom door ajar, cold fluorescent light spilling a hard blue-white stripe across worn rust-brown carpet. The exterior sodium-orange neon from the motel sign bleeds through a two-inch gap in heavy blackout curtains, painting a warm wedge across the far wall. Air conditioning unit under the window hums at a low rattle. Ice bucket on the dresser, a duffel bag on the luggage rack, cell phone face-down on the nightstand.
data.atmosphere: Isolated, transient, anxious — a place where nobody stays by choice

light_base_state.primary_source: Bedside lamp with yellowed fabric shade
practical_sources: bathroom fluorescent off-screen spill (5500K, hard edge on carpet)
neon sign through curtain gap (1900K sodium-orange wedge on far wall)

key_details: Faded teal polyester bedspread on sagging queen bed
Chipped laminate nightstand with rotary-style phone and Gideon Bible
CRT television on angled wall bracket — no flat screen
Heavy blackout curtains with two-inch gap leaking sodium neon orange
Worn rust-brown carpet with cigarette burn near door threshold
Bathroom door ajar — hard fluorescent stripe across carpet
Rattling window AC unit beneath curtain line
Duffel bag on collapsible luggage rack
negative_list: Flat-screen TV or any post-2005 electronics
Smartphone or modern charger cables visible
Clean modern bathroom fixtures or LED lighting
